title: Initialize Cargo workspace and crate layout
description: Set up the Cargo workspace with the initial crate structure. The binary crate is named 'smallhold'. Decide workspace layout: single crate or split lib+bin. Given the scope, a single crate with modules is appropriate for v1. Add all dependency crates to Cargo.toml with pinned versions matching the spec.
design: Single crate, modules for: db, config, api, federation, cli, media, streaming. No lib/bin split in v1 — premature.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build succeeds; cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings passes; all crates from spec are in Cargo.toml (axum, sqlx/sqlite, activitypub-federation, reqwest/rustls-tls, serde_json, ammonia, pulldown-cmark, image, fast_image_resize, blurhash, argon2, tracing, tracing-subscriber, clap v4)
